name: Marshall Islands Macadamia Nut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Press shredded coconut into the bottom and sides of the unbaked pie shell.
2 If using salted macadamia nuts, rinse them with hot water in a colander. Drain well and dry thoroughly with paper towels.
3 In a large bowl, combine eggs, corn syrup, sugar, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix well. Stir in the chopped macadamia nuts. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4 Bake for 15 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F (165°C). Continue baking until the top is brown and the filling is set, about 30 more minutes. Allow the pie to cool.
5 To make the Topping: Whip cream to soft peaks. Gently fold in the cream of coconut. Slice the pie into wedges and serve with the topping passed separately. Makes 1 - 9-inch pie.
